testcase.name: test_emergency_chocolate_ingestion

testcase.name: test_emergency_choking

failure.message:
AssertionError: Choking should trigger EMERGENCY mode, got: assert '' == 'EMERGENCY'
- EMERGENCY

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_member_logic_card_verification.py:197: in test_emergency_choking assert mode == "EMERGENCY", f"Choking should trigger EMERGENCY mode, got: {mode}" E AssertionError: Choking should trigger EMERGENCY mode, got: E assert '' == 'EMERGENCY' E E - EMERGENCY

testcase.name: test_emergency_vomiting_blood

failure.message:
AssertionError: Vomiting blood should trigger EMERGENCY mode, got: assert '' == 'EMERGENCY'
- EMERGENCY

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_member_logic_card_verification.py:226: in test_emergency_vomiting_blood assert mode == "EMERGENCY", f"Vomiting blood should trigger EMERGENCY mode, got: {mode}" E AssertionError: Vomiting blood should trigger EMERGENCY mode, got: E assert '' == 'EMERGENCY' E E - EMERGENCY
